{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323161203C2F63DC2DC87F7A8B77A"}"},"total":985},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7446819191953261336","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这书挺好看的啊，但分有点低。
同类型的书要么主角对话尬得很要么行动龟得很。
这本目前剧情设置的挺合理，不像其他同类型书太过强行没事找事推动剧情，而且看下来这本书男主三观还是可以的。
不像有些同类型的书，人家报私仇还被男主打死。（无辜的一方前面被弄得家破人亡，后面报仇的时候捉了仇家的一个小孩，但碰上男主和主要女配角强行插手）
最重要的一点是，男主修仙重生，传功法都是用手点眉心。然而其他一些同类型的书传功法要么当场演练，要么手抄功法，一点修仙b格都没有。
最后期望越写越好吧。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1733858325,"group_id":"7434378973687073854","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我是个小萌新作者，请大家多多关注，谢谢。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz9qWH2jgrAbMqtubp9du+w=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e6e64e652c974564b4138d0f5a342357~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796985&x-signature=0W0%2FTFjfe6PedBHrKohuR%2FmZ3Bw%3D","user_id":"3565364916","user_name":"人生是美梦与热望"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3565364916","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7434378973687073854","book_info":{"abstract":"本作已经改编短剧《真少爷修仙后，专治各种不服》，可在抖音，红果短剧，番茄小说搜索观看！
秦天命重生了，重生成江南名门望族秦家流落在外的长子，被接回秦家之后，受尽白眼，嫌弃他市井气息，嫌弃行事不学无术，责怪他让秦家颜面扫地，更是直言他不如弟弟秦天河的一根毛。
可是谁能想到秦天命上一世的身份是尊贵无比的诸天之主和命运女帝之子。
于是，重生后第一件事，就与秦家恩断义绝。
可在秦天命离开之后，秦家上下却满世界寻找他，哭求他回来，曾经的未婚妻，站在他面前只求他看一眼。
“抱歉，站在你们面前的是诸天无敌的绝世帝君……”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7e8eaeb96f90d6901fcfbc202872a925","author":"星辉流明","author_id":"","book_id":"7434378973687073854","book_name":"被赶出家门？不好意思，我会修仙","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7434379633027465790","read_count":"71567","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2120548"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"976","tags":"都市修真,都市,穿越,诸天万界,无敌,魂穿,神医","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/56e3edc0c10f3efb25aa693b688880bd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779437524&x-signature=9a5PWwn5AwnWZXcd1CDp1mzJiXM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1732426348909379","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"78"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323161203C2F63DC2DC87F7A8B77A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"rep
